task_frame_summary: The product brief feels complete and implementation-ready, but that cleanliness may be carrying more scope confidence than the explicit constraints support.
assumed_goal: Keep the case inside the valid baseline route while preventing polish from substituting for explicit constraint grounding.
explicit_constraints: Stay inside the bounded Studio proposal and review package layer.
Do not infer hidden approval or rollout semantics.
latent_frame_risks: A polished brief can hide under-specified forbidden zones.
Presentation quality can be mistaken for evidence completeness.
missing_but_decisive_questions: Which constraints are explicit rather than merely conventional?
What part of the brief feels complete only because it is cleanly phrased?
frame_risk_signals: high polish with low evidence density
scope feels cleaner than the explicit boundary language
